title: Laptop not connecting to VPN
description: My laptop stopped connecting to the company VPN since this morning. I have tried restarting but the issue persists.

messages.body: My laptop stopped connecting to the company VPN since this morning. I have tried restarting but the issue persists.
Thanks for reporting this. I assigned the case to myself and I am checking VPN access logs now.

title: Email not syncing on mobile
description: Company emails are not syncing on my work phone. Last sync was two days ago.

messages.body: Company emails are not syncing on my work phone. Last sync was two days ago.
I reset the mobile sync profile and moved this ticket to in progress. Please retry after signing out and back in.

title: Cannot access shared drive
description: Getting a permissions error when trying to open the shared marketing drive. Was working last week.

messages.body: Getting a permissions error when trying to open the shared marketing drive. Was working last week.

title: Printer offline in Room 204
description: The printer on the second floor Room 204 shows as offline. Multiple people in the team are affected.

messages.body: The printer on the second floor Room 204 shows as offline. Multiple people in the team are affected.
The printer was reconnected to the network and test pages printed successfully. Closing this ticket.
